title: The Girl in the Rain
excerpt: A mysterious girl appears in the rain, and the street feels like it’s holding its breath.
content: The rain fell softly across the empty street.
She appeared through the mist like a memory refusing to fade.
I should have walked away… but some stories pull you in before you even notice.

title: The Last Train
excerpt: A lonely station. A train that shouldn’t exist. And a ticket with your name on it.
content: The station clock was stuck at 11:11.
No announcements. No footsteps. Only the humming lights.
Then the rails began to sing — a sound that meant something was coming.
